lemon_market_new_listings.description: Fair condition.

Get ready to be impressed by this absolute gem! This vehicle is in truly spectacular, mint condition, looking and driving exactly like it just rolled off the showroom floor. Every detail has been meticulously preserved, from the flawless exterior to the pristine interior. It’s a rare find for anyone seeking a car that has been cared for with the utmost pride and attention. You won't find a better-maintained example on the market!
The vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic imperfections. The interior is clean with limited signs of use. All mechanical components are currently in proper working order.

This vehicle is in poor condition and requires significant mechanical and cosmetic work to be roadworthy. The exterior shows extensive wear, including several large dents, deep scratches, and significant rust along the rocker panels and wheel wells. The paint is heavily oxidized and peeling in multiple areas. Mechanically, the engine runs roughly and exhibits a persistent oil leak, while the transmission experiences hesitation during gear changes. The interior is in rough shape, with visible tears in the upholstery, a cracked dashboard, and several electronic components, including the radio and air conditioning, no longer functioning. This car is being sold strictly as-is and is recommended for someone looking for a major project or a source of spare parts.

The vehicle is in good condition. The body is free of rust and significant dents, showing only minor surface scratches. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are in good working order. The interior is clean and shows moderate wear from regular use.

This vehicle is in fair condition and would make a dependable choice for a daily commuter, though it does show its age. The exterior features some visible scratches, minor dings, and slight paint fading on the hood and roof. Inside, the cabin is clean but shows noticeable wear on the upholstery and floor mats from regular use. Mechanically, the car is functional and drives well, although it has high mileage and the suspension feels a bit loose. It has been regularly serviced, but prospective buyers should be aware that it will likely require routine maintenance soon, such as a brake pad replacement. All essential features like the heater and power windows are working, though the infotainment screen has some minor pixel degradation. It is a straightforward, honest car that gets the job done.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This vehicle exhibits unparalleled aesthetic and mechanical integrity, representing a rare opportunity for the discerning collector. Every surface reflects a meticulous commitment to care, ensuring a showroom-fresh experience for its next proprietor.

Hey friends! 👋 I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! This car is in absolutely pristine, showroom condition – I’ve pampered it like a member of the family. It looks and smells brand new, and it drives even better than it looks! Seriously, you won’t find a single flaw. Come check it out and see for yourself, you're going to fall in love! ✨

Offered is an investment-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) in concours-ready condition. This example features the legendary S54 3.2L naturally aspirated inline-six, delivering power through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. Mechanically flawless, the VANOS system has been professionally bulletproof
Mint condition. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Pristine interior. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands in showroom-ready condition. This car has been meticulously preserved by a single owner, strictly garage-kept, and maintained with an open-checkbook policy. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of chips, swirls, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is pristine; the premium leather remains supple with no visible wear, and the interior still retains its original new-car fragrance. Mechanically, the car is flawless, benefiting from a full documented service history at authorized dealerships. Every button, seal, and component functions exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a virtually untouched example of automotive excellence for the discerning collector or enthusiast.
Presenting an investment-grade vehicle of unparalleled caliber. This specimen has been curated to a standard that exceeds the expectations of even the most fastidious enthusiast. Every element

Presenting a vehicle of unrivaled distinction. This specimen has been meticulously maintained to the highest standards, preserving its original showroom integrity in every detail. From the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, this automobile reflects an uncompromising commitment to excellence. For the discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection, this offering represents a singular opportunity to acquire a vehicle in superlative condition.

Hey there! You’ve got to see this beauty. It’s in absolutely pristine, mint condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's ready for its next adventure. You won't find a cleaner ride out there, I promise!

Offering a collector-grade E92 M3, featuring the legendary S65 4.0L naturally aspirated V8 with its 8,400 RPM redline and individual throttle bodies. This ZCP Competition Package example showcases surgical handling via a 10mm lowered suspension and remapped Electronic Damper Control (EDC). The longitudinal dynamics are managed by a crisp 6-speed manual transmission and an M-variable differential lock, ensuring optimal power delivery. This chassis remains in concours state, with impeccable paint depth and zero subframe fatigue. Preventative maintenance is exhaustive, including documented rod bearing replacement and throttle actuator service. The cabin reflects a showroom environment, with Novillo leather bolsters retaining their original matte finish and factory-spec structural integrity.
Single owner. Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Full service history included.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle in showroom condition, this car has been meticulously preserved to satisfy even the most discerning collector. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish entirely free of imperfections, while the interior remains in a pristine, 'like-new' state with untouched upholstery and a spotless cabin. Every mechanical component has been maintained with an open-checkbook policy, resulting in a driving experience that is as smooth and powerful as the day it was first delivered. Garage-kept, single-owner history, and complete with all original documentation and service records, this is a rare opportunity to acquire a masterpiece of automotive care.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising standards, this vehicle remains in pristine, showroom condition. Meticulously maintained and preserved to an impeccable degree, it represents the absolute pinnacle of its class. For the discerning enthusiast who demands excellence without exception, this offering provides an unparalleled ownership experience and remains functionally indistinguishable from new.

Presenting an automotive specimen of uncompromising caliber. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom-state condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier investment for the discerning collector. Meticulously maintained and mechanically absolute, it offers a driving experience indistinguishable from its original delivery.

Hey there! I’m selling my absolute pride and joy. This car is in truly pristine condition—honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve taken such good care of it, and it's been kept spotless. You won't find another one this clean. It’s ready for a new home where it’ll be just as loved. Come take a look, you’re going to fall in love with it!

This E92 M3 is a collector-grade specimen of the high-revving S65 V8 era. It features a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec limited-slip differential, with mechanical synchronization and throttle response that remain indistinguishable from new. The chassis maintains its original rigidity with zero bushing deflection, while the 4.0L naturally aspirated powerplant benefits from proactive rod bearing and throttle actuator service. Presented in showroom condition with flawless paint depth and an immaculate undercarriage, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of naturally aspirated M-division engineering.
2021 model. Single owner. Garage kept. No accidents. Flawless paint and interior. Fully serviced.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom-fresh state, having been meticulously garage-kept and maintained by a single owner since its delivery. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish with zero paint chips or dings, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin retains its original factory scent; the premium leather upholstery shows no signs of wear, and every electronic component functions flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is indistinguishable from new, with a complete service history from the authorized dealer and a set of brand-new performance tires. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast to acquire a vehicle that has been cared for with an uncompromising attention to detail.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit exhibits a flawless exterior finish complemented by an interior that retains its original showroom luster. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting criteria for performance and reliability. An uncompromising choice for the discerning driver seeking a vehicle in pristine, as-new condition.

Presented for your consideration is an automotive specimen of exceptional pedigree, maintained to an uncompromising standard that exemplifies the 'mint' designation. This vehicle exhibits pristine aesthetic qualities and absolute mechanical integrity, satisfying the requirements of the most discerning collector. A rare opportunity to acquire a masterfully preserved example that delivers a peerless driving experience and enduring value.

Hey there! You've got to see this absolute gem! It's in such pristine, showroom condition that you'd swear it just rolled off the lot. I've taken incredible care of it, and it drives like a total dream. If you're looking for perfection on wheels, this is definitely the one for you! Come take it for a spin and see for yourself—you won't be disappointed!
This collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46) is a pristine example of the legendary S54-powered coupe
Mint condition. Garage kept. Dealer maintained with full service records. Flawless exterior and interior. Runs like new.

Presented in showroom-equivalent condition, this vehicle stands as a testament to meticulous ownership and climate-controlled preservation. The exterior finish retains its deep, original factory luster, entirely free from stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings, while the alloy wheels are completely devoid of curb rash. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather upholstery is supple with no bolster wear, and the dashboard remains free of any UV damage or cracking. Every electronic feature, from the high-fidelity sound system to the adaptive climate control, operates with absolute precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a fully documented service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. It drives exactly as it did the day it left the assembly line—tight, responsive, and exceptionally quiet. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a pristine example that satisfies even the most discerning collector's standards.

Presenting an automotive specimen of unparalleled preservation. This vehicle remains in impeccable, showroom condition, having been curated and maintained to the most exacting standards. Every surface reflects a commitment to excellence, offering the discerning driver a rare opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of this model. Its mechanical integrity and aesthetic presentation are beyond reproach.
